prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年理科最低位次约1723名（旧高考模式），2024年理科最低位次约120名，2025年物理类最低位次约127名。2024至2025年位次基本稳定在120-127名区间，近 两年波动幅度约7名，表明复旦大学在宁夏物理类考生中的录取位次已趋于稳定；2025年物理类计划招生13人，2026年计划招生9人，较上年缩招4人，降 幅约31%。缩招意味着竞争加剧，在同等报考热度下，录取位次数字应有所减小（更容易进入）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科2026年 主榜排名全国第5名，属于全国顶尖高校梯队，对高分考生有持续吸引力；2025年声誉评价为偏正面（新闻传播学获评A++等级）；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，涉 及师德师风、学校管理等问题，但整体仍属可控范围。抖音热度总排名第4（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；复旦大学拥有27个A-及以上学科，其 中A+学科11个（中国史、中国语言文学、哲学、政治学、数学、新闻传播学、物理学、理论经济学、生物学、马克思主义理论、公共卫生与预防医学），学科实力顶尖，对优质生 源吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业涵盖工科试验班（香农计划、集成电路领军人才班、计算与智能领军人才班等）、数学类、核工程与核技术等，均为当前社 会热门方向；宁夏2026年考生总数约66000人，竞争环境稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次127名、2026年计划缩招31%带来的竞争加剧效应、声誉 偏负面对报考心理的微弱抑制作用，以及学校顶尖层次对考生的持续吸引力，预计2026年物理类录取位次较2025年略有前移（位次数字减小）。预测最低位次约109名，区间59-15 9名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the lowest ranking for science was approximately 1723 (old college entrance exam mode), in 2024 it was about 120, and in 2025 for Physics Category it was about 127. From 2024 to 2025, the ranking remained basically stable in the 120-127 range, with a fluctuation of about 7 positions in the past two years, indicating that Fudan University's admission ranking among Ningxia Physics Category candidates has stabilized; in 2025, the Physics Category enrollment plan was 13 students, and in 2026 it is planned to be 9 students, a reduction of 4 students compared to the previous year, a decrease of about 31%. The reduction means intensified competition, and under the same application popularity, the admission ranking number should decrease (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 5th nationally in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, belonging to the top tier of national universities, with sustained appeal to high-scoring candidates; in 2025, the reputation evaluation was slightly positive (Journalism and Communication rated A++ level); in 2026, the reputation evaluation was slightly negative, involving issues such as teacher ethics and school management, but overall still within a controllable range. Douyin popularity total ranking 4th (high heat), with large short video exposure and high application attention; Fudan University has 27 A- and above disciplines, including 11 A+ disciplines (Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Philosophy, Political Science, Mathematics, Journalism and Communication, Physics, Theoretical Economics, Biology, Marxist Theory, Public Health and Preventive Medicine), with top-tier disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-quality students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category enrollment majors include Engineering Experimental Class (Xiangnong Plan, Integrated Circuit Leading Talent Class, Computing and Intelligence Leading Talent Class, etc.), Mathematics Class, Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology, etc., all of which are currently popular directions in society; in 2026, the total number of candidates in Ningxia is about 66,000, with a stable competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 127, the intensified competition effect from the 2026 enrollment reduction of 31%, the slight inhibitory effect of negative reputation on application psychology, and the sustained appeal of the school's top tier to candidates, it is expected that the 2026 Physics Category admission ranking will slightly move forward (ranking number decreases). The predicted lowest ranking is about 109, with a range of 59-159.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Xiangnong Plan)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligence Leading Talent Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information Leading Talent Class)

Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology (Nuclear Major)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 59-159, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 59), you can focus on sprinting for flagship majors such as Mathematics Class and Xiangnong Plan.
